creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Sat, 13 Nov 1999 nave@azstarnet.com wrote:

> My FreeBSD desktop cannot fetch the OpenSSH source from the cvs server 
> from behind my NAT router.  The router, which has 3.2-STABLE installed,
> can access the files with no problems.

Sounds like you need to configure your router to handle CVS? In other
words, a NAT problem, not a ports one.

Kris

----
Cthulhu for President! For when you're tired of choosing the _lesser_ of
two evils..
